focus_intent: Frost dashboard refactored onto dashboard-skeleton tokens + .lg-* Liquid Glass classes. Warm rose-magenta accent #CB4878 (operator brief: not too red, not too purple, not too dark). Live with --reload on http://127.0.0.1:5085/ (background task b9ko7ada5). Next: (a) when JS-only ferrari/triage results return long blocks, audit pre line-wrap; (b) refactor remaining freeze surfaces to consume same tokens; (c) pin port 5085 in freeze/config.py since vault squats 5079.

ui_inheritance.doctrine: CLAUDE.md 2026-05-24 UI-canonical hard-canonical (inherit + EXPAND, never fork)

accent_override.rationale: Operator 2026-05-24 19:48Z: 'purple warm red dark mode style ... not too red not too purple not too dark'. Sits between purple-600 #7C3AED and danger #E5484D on the warm-red axis.

surface_override.rationale: Operator brief 'not too dark' — bumped luminance and added warm plum tint so the gradient backdrop reads as 'pretty dark mode' not 'oled black'.

ui_inheritance.body_backdrop: 3-stop radial gradient: accent-700 at top-left, accent-500 at top-right, accent-900 at bottom-center, layered over surface-0
ui_inheritance.expansion_principle: Per CLAUDE.md UI-canonical: when this lane needs a primitive the skeleton lacks, add to skeleton FIRST then consume. Current usage stays within the imported subset; no fork.

open_followups: Pin Frost default port to 5085 in freeze/config.py (vault keeps 5079)
Persist Frost as a real service (Task Scheduler / NSSM) so it survives session-end
Wire ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + Telegram bot env so brief/wrap leave local-fallback
Audit pre-block line-wrap when ferrari/triage results exceed card width on narrow viewports
If skeleton lacks a Frost-specific primitive in future (e.g. lead-card, drive-pill), commit to skeleton FIRST per UI-canonical EXPAND rule
